title: Use Talk to Dossie
description: Ask Dossie anything about your transactions and get an answer in seconds — no typing required.
voiceover_script: Hi, I'm Dossie. When you're driving between showings, tap Talk to Dossie at the top. Ask me anything — when does this option period expire, what's left to do on this file, who do I still need to email. I'll pull the answer from your pipeline and tell you back, hands free.
